description_long: This shotgun features a futuristic, angular design with a predominantly dark gray body accented by sharp red highlights and subtle blue lines. The main body is robust and boxy, with a prominent rectangular barrel and a vented muzzle at the front. The grip is ergonomic and integrated into the lower section, with a visible trigger and a squared trigger guard. The stock is compact and merges seamlessly with the rear of the weapon, lacking any traditional shoulder rest. The top of the shotgun includes a rail-like structure, possibly for mounting accessories, and the sides display geometric paneling and small illuminated details. The overall appearance suggests a high-tech, tactical firearm suitable for urban environments.
description: A futuristic, angular shotgun with a dark gray body, red accents, and a compact, ergonomic grip. It features a boxy barrel, vented muzzle, and integrated rail details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the rectangular muzzle, vented barrel, and red accent at the tip.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the angular body, ergonomic grip, and rail structure on top.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the compact stock, rear sight, and central alignment of the barrel.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with visible paneling, grip, and illuminated details.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel with a rectangular, vented muzzle and no visible ribbing or secondary barrel
attribute_trigger_guard_design: Squared, elongated trigger guard with a flat lower edge and no visible finger grooves
